columns.name: logTidspunkt
columns.description: The timestamp when the login or password action occurred

columns.name: passord
columns.description: The encrypted password used for authentication

columns.name: tidspunkt
columns.description: The timestamp when the action occurred, possibly related to logging or events

columns.name: brukerid
columns.description: The unique identifier for the user who performed the action

columns.name: opprettet
columns.description: The timestamp when the record was created or updated

columns.name: feilForsokTeller
columns.description: The count of failed attempts for login or password changes

columns.name: feilForsokTid
columns.description: The timestamp when the last failed attempt occurred

columns.name: informert
columns.description: An indicator showing whether the user has been informed of a certain event

columns.name: sistInnlogget
columns.description: The timestamp when the user last logged in

columns.name: komentar
columns.description: Additional comments or remarks related to the login or password action

columns.name: prodnr
columns.description: The unique product identification number, possibly used in relation to customer orders

columns.name: kornOppgjorPrMail
columns.description: An indicator showing whether the process has been handled by email or not

columns.name: tempMailadr
columns.description: The temporary email address associated with a customer or user, possibly for password reset purposes

columns.name: ordrebekrPrMail
columns.description: An indicator showing whether the order confirmation has been handled by email or not

columns.name: fastOrdrekommensar
columns.description: The final comment related to the order, possibly from a customer service representative

columns.name: koblingsKundenr
columns.description: The linked customer number for potential multi-customer relations or accounts

columns.name: bekreftetBruker
columns.description: The timestamp when the user was confirmed, possibly related to an account activation process
